messages.subject: Thursday launch review
messages.snippet: Can we use the first half for the customer walkthrough?
messages.bodyText:
Hi Alex,

Can we use the first half of Thursday's review for the customer walkthrough? Sam can cover the migration notes after that.

Thanks,
Maya
messages.bodyHtml:
Hi Alex,

messages.subject: Re: Thursday launch review
messages.snippet: That works. I will send the updated agenda this afternoon.
messages.bodyText:
That works. I will send the updated agenda this afternoon and leave ten minutes at the end for open questions.

Alex
messages.bodyHtml:
That works. I will send the updated agenda this afternoon and leave ten minutes at the end for open questions.

Alex

messages.subject: Re: Thursday launch review
messages.snippet: I added the revised agenda and confirmed the design review.
messages.bodyText:
Perfect. I added the revised agenda and confirmed that Nora will join for the design review.

See you Thursday,
Maya
messages.bodyHtml:
Perfect. I added the revised agenda and confirmed that Nora will join for the design review.

messages.subject: Security keys and recovery
messages.bodyText: Generate a vault key on-device. Keep the recovery key offline. GalMail is not subpoena-proof.
messages.bodyHtml:
Generate a vault key on-device. Keep the recovery key offline.

GalMail is not subpoena-proof.
